name: Chess Multiplayer
author: Poki
description: Dive into Chess Multiplayer, the premier browser chess game on Poki! Whether you’re a strategic mastermind or a casual player, enjoy endless fun with our versatile gameplay modes: single-player, multiplayer, and local matches. Elevate your chess experience with our in-game economy, allowing you to customize your chess pieces and unlock exclusive themes. Complete engaging achievements and climb the leaderboards to showcase your skills against players worldwide! Join a vibrant community of chess enthusiasts and challenge friends or AI opponents in thrilling matches. Ready to make your next move? Play Chess Multiplayer now and become a chess champion! How do I play Chess Multiplayer? Use your mouse to click on the chess pieces and move them across the board. Who created Chess Multiplayer? Chess Multiplayer is created by InfinityGames.io. Play their other games on Poki: Tic Tac Toe , Energy , Infinity Loop: Hex , Merge Shapes , Shapes , Solitaire , Spider Solitaire , Sudoblocks , Laser Quest , Wood Blocks 3D , Classic Chess , and Maze: Path of Light ! How can I play Chess Multiplayer for free? You can play Chess Multiplayer for free on Poki. Can I play Chess Multiplayer on mobile devices and desktop? Chess Multiplayer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Chess Multiplayer with my friend? Yes! Chess Multiplayer is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!
